nodes.name: Otus
nodes.summary: Otus（Otus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联54种鸟类，如White-fronted scops owl、Andaman scops owl、Reddish scops owl等54种鸟类。

nodes.name: Enggano scops owl
nodes.summary: Enggano scops owl（Otus enganensis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Enggano scops owl。

nodes.name: Enggano scops owl
nodes.summary: The Enggano scops owl (Otus enganensis) is an owl endemic to Enggano Island, Indonesia. References BirdLife Species Factsheet - Enggano Scops-owl Red Data Book
nodes.shortSummary: The Enggano scops owl (Otus enganensis) is an owl endemic to Enggano Island, Indonesia. References BirdLife Species Factsheet - Enggano Sco…
